title: Ignitus roll six deals thirty damage

card.rawText: Roll 1 die to inflict damage on a creature. If the result is: 1-5: 15 damage. 6: 30 damage.

plan.title: Ignitus roll six deals thirty damage
plan.summary: Play Ignitus, target the opponent primary creature, and verify the high-roll damage branch.

notes: Force the effect die to 6 to cover Ignitus's printed 30 damage branch.

steps: Choose player_2 primary creature as the target.

expectedAssertions.label: Ignitus goes to cemetery after resolution

manualVerification: Confirm a 1-5 roll would use the 15 damage branch.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the high-roll branch only.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Ignitus roll damage table high branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
